scope: Regression evidence only. The production root was not redesigned in Phase 1.

automatedChecks.result: root regression passed at 390, 768, 1280, and 1440 pixels
automatedChecks.proves: The unchanged production root returned 200, retained its primary heading, remained a substantial long page, accepted keyboard focus, exposed the settled hero under reduced motion, had no horizontal overflow, and had no Axe violations in main.

coverage.screenshotCoverage: complete at all four required breakpoints
coverage.accessibilityCoverage: complete at all four required breakpoints
coverage.fixtureCoverage: complete through the deterministic public homepage

qualification: This evidence does not claim that every legacy root state is fully remediated or that Phase 1 changes production Timeline.
